insight.headline: Storefront API Update
insight.what_changed: The Storefront API now supports the @inContext directive with an optional channelId argument as of version 2026-10. This allows developers to apply a specific sales channel's context to an entire query. The @inContext directive can be used to fetch data specific to a particular sales channel.
insight.developer_impact: Developers using the Storefront API should update their queries to utilize the new @inContext directive with the channelId argument. This will enable them to fetch data specific to a particular sales channel, providing more accurate and relevant results for merchants. When using the @inContext directive, ensure that the channelId is correctly specified to avoid errors. Additionally, developers should review their existing queries to determine where the @inContext directive can be applied to improve the merchant experience.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will benefit from more accurate and relevant data being displayed on their storefronts, as developers can now fetch data specific to their sales channels.
insight.why_it_matters: This update provides more flexibility and accuracy in fetching data from the Storefront API, allowing developers to create more tailored experiences for merchants and their customers.

also_worth_knowing.text: Card deposit endpoint now requires mTLS certificate

updates.summary: The CLI has been updated to fix a warning when running theme commands in valid theme directories and to bump Shopify/theme-tools packages.

updates.title: Card deposit endpoint now requires mTLS certificate
updates.summary: The card deposit endpoint now requires a Shopify-issued mTLS client certificate, affecting apps that store cardholder data.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.2
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI has been updated with non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags and the ability to bypass confirmation prompts in hydrogen upgrade.

updates.title: Updated App Store requirements: 4.1.2 Use a unique name for your app
updates.summary: App Store requirements have been updated to include the use of a unique name for each app to reduce merchant confusion.

updates.title: Storefront API `@inContext` supports `channelId`
updates.summary: The Storefront API now supports the channelId argument in the @inContext directive, allowing for channel-specific context in queries.

updates.title: `productId`, `title`,`variantSku`, and `variantTitle` fields added to `ExchangeLineItem`
updates.summary: New fields have been added to the ExchangeLineItem type, including productId, title, variantSku, and variantTitle.

updates.title: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components
updates.summary: POS UI Extensions now include discount allocations to bundle components, allowing apps to access component-level discount allocations.
The CLI has been updated to bump cli-hydrogen to 13.0.1.
New store commands have been introduced in the CLI, including listing and store creation.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI has been updated to read disabled command metadata and preserve actionable build errors during deployment.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: Create Hydrogen now adds an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: The Hydrogen skeleton has been updated to add an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

recap.headline: Shopify updates for Hydrogen, Storefront API, and CLI

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen received updates in @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.2, @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1, and @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38, adding non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags, and preserving actionable build errors during deployment.

themes.title: API Changes
themes.detail: The Storefront API now supports the channelId argument in the @inContext directive, and the card-deposit endpoint requires a Shopify-issued mTLS client certificate. Additionally, new fields were added to the ExchangeLineItem type, and discount allocations are now available for bundle components in the POS UI Extensions API.

themes.title: CLI Updates
themes.detail: The Shopify CLI was updated to version 4.5.2, which fixed warnings when running theme commands and bumped Shopify/theme-tools packages. Version 4.5.1 and 4.5.0 also introduced new store commands and updated cli-hydrogen to 13.0.1.

actions.text: Update Hydrogen projects to use the latest @shopify/cli-hydrogen
Implement mTLS client certificates for the card-deposit endpoint
Review App Store requirements, including the new unique app name requirement
